note: Aspiration inventory (BROWNFIELD-PROTOCOL v0.1 §3) — everything the project intends, harvested at Phase −1 from spec/WAL.md (Next / Known issues / decisions pending), CONTINUE.md next-steps, and ROADMAP.md open milestones. TASKS.md does not exist (recorded; its dangling ROADMAP pointer is DBT-0017). Carry-over guarantee (BROWNFIELD §8): at beta exit every entry reaches done | rescoped | rejected — unaccounted must be zero. States: open | done | rescoped | rejected. Phase 6 reconciliation 2026-06-10: every entry carries a resolution; unaccounted = 0.

entries.text: Run the first full PROP-013 health audit (fresh breadth-first sweep of the §2.2 checklist — the seed run was not one); re-judge the 10 carried findings; reconcile AUDIT.md with terraform/registry/debt.json

resolution.note: An instrumented category-C audit ran 2026-06-10 (AUDIT.md, terraform close-out): specmap suspects/orphans/disputes + conform findings are now machine-fed. The full manual §2.2 breadth sweep stays the next audit window's job — floor: once per milestone (PROP-013 §3).

entries.text: Close the P1 coverage gap: hermetic harness driving GitPackageRegistry against real file:// git repositories named per the fqdn convention, plus a default-path `vibe init` → `vibe install` e2e (no --registry)

resolution.note: First brick landed: the differential oracle (d8e3420) drives the multi-registry stack against REAL bare git repos under fqdn naming, hermetically. The default-path `vibe init` → `vibe install` e2e remains — carried by AUDIT P1.
